main.aboutTitle: I build and maintain web projects with PHP, Yii2, and Laravel.
main.aboutDescription:
I work with custom CMS platforms, order modules, payment flows, CRM integrations, and REST APIs.
 I help existing projects stay stable: fixing issues, optimizing queries, adapting code to newer PHP versions, and supporting Nuxt migrations.

positioning.subtitle: What I do
positioning.title: Backend / Fullstack developer for CRM, integrations, APIs, and admin panels.
positioning.description: I help automate business processes: from leads and orders to payments, personal accounts, and internal management panels.

stack.stackTitle: Technologies that actually appear across my projects.
stack.stackDescription:
My core focus is PHP 8+, Yii2, Laravel, REST API, MySQL, Redis, and Vue/Nuxt frontend support.
 Percentages are based on how often a skill appears in projects, while standalone integrations are listed separately without affecting the scale.

integrations.subtitle: Integrations
integrations.title: I connect services that move leads, payments, and data.
integrations.description: This usually goes beyond API clients: webhooks, callbacks, status sync, logging, and fitting the flow into an existing CMS or CRM.

items.amocrm: Sending leads and orders into pipelines, creating deals, and syncing fields and order contents.
items.kaspi: Payment and commerce flows: checkout, status checks, and linking orders with payments.
items.freedom: Payment flow integration, callback processing, result verification, and error logging.
items.tarlanPayments: Online payments, transaction status handling, protected callback logic, and issue diagnostics.

projects.casesTitle: Commercial projects with CMS, APIs, orders, and integrations.
projects.casesDescription: This section collects websites and services where I worked on support, module development, integrations, optimization, and evolution of an existing codebase.

career.careerDescription: My work history, key tasks, and achievements in companies.
